title: veridict compare report
description: JSON output of `veridict compare` for a single --metric run. A multi-metric run instead produces multi-report.schema.json (a Vec of this shape plus an overall verdict) - see report.rs's Report/MultiReport split.

schema_version.description: Stays 1 across additive changes (new fields/variants); bumps only when a field is removed or renamed.

effect.description: Point estimate. Centered on 0 for winrate/sign-test/elo (deviation from a 50/50 split); in the input's own units for mean-diff.

estimated_additional_trials.description: Rough estimate of additional trials to reach a decisive verdict. null when already decided, zero trials, or the effect is inside the pass/fail threshold band (see docs/metrics.md). Exact (binary-searched against the real CI function) for winrate/sign-test/elo; an O(1/sqrt(n)) heuristic with a documented bias for mean-diff.

warnings.description: Human-readable data-quality flags; never affects verdict. Structured counterpart is data_quality.

correction_method.description: Present only when `compare --correction bonferroni|holm` was requested for this run; omitted entirely (not null) otherwise, so a default run's JSON is byte-identical to before this field existed.

family_size.description: Number of --metric flags in this run's family; present only alongside correction_method. mean-diff counts toward this even though it can't be individually corrected (see achieved_alpha).

achieved_alpha.description: Smallest one-sided significance at which this report's own CI would still pass, in the same units as (1 - confidence). Present only for a report whose unadjusted verdict was pass and whose metric has a closed-form CI (not mean-diff).

adjusted_alpha_threshold.description: The corrected significance threshold achieved_alpha was actually compared against (alpha/family_size for bonferroni; alpha/(family_size-rank+1) for holm). Present exactly when achieved_alpha is.

unadjusted_verdict.description: This report's verdict before correction was applied. Present only alongside correction_method; verdict above already reflects the adjusted value.

high_failure_rate.description: over 20% of trials failed to execute

draw_heavy.description: elo only; always false for other metrics. Over 50% draws.

low_id_diversity.description: one id repeated >= 3 times among >= 10 id-tagged trials, unpaired mode only; always false when --paired-by-id is set or too few records carry an id
